allow: PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5500 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Host "done")
PowerShell(\(Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; where.exe gh 2>$null; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
